name: Herb Marinated Grilled Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp fresh thyme leaves or 1/2 tsp dried thyme
1 tsp fresh basil, chopped or 1/2 tsp dried basil
1 tsp fresh oregano, chopped or 1/2 tsp dried oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinade: Whisk together all ingredients in a small bowl.
2. Arrange the vegetables in a shallow dish or plastic container.
3. Pour the marinade over them and cover; refrigerate for 2 hours.
4. Prepare a grill.
5. Remove the vegetables from the marinade (reserve the marinade).
6. Grill the vegetables, keeping them about 6 inches away from the heat source.
7. Brush them with the marinade as they cook.
8. Cooking times will vary according to the vegetables.
